kpis.name: Carries (xT) per 100 receptions
kpis.description: Accumulated expected threat from carries compared to the number of shots and multiplied by 100.

kpis.name: High turnovers per low reception
kpis.description: Number of possessions lost (failed passes, bad ball touches or lost attacking duels) compared to total number of ball receptions in own 40% of the pitch.

kpis.name: Passes (xT) per 100 receptions
kpis.description: Accumulated expected threat from passes compared to the number of shots and multiplied by 100.

kpis.name: Possessions won per opponent possession
kpis.description: Number of recovered possessions divided by total number of opponent possessions.

kpis.name: xG + xA per 100 touches
kpis.description: The sum of accumulated non-penalty xG and xA divided by the number of touches and multiplied by 100.

kpis.name: xG per shot
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG compared to the number of shots.

kpis.name: xGChain per possession
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG for possessions in which a player is involved in at least one event divided by total number of possession involvements.
